chinese_news.title: 映界科技：一支00后团队的空间智能“赌注” | 水下项目
chinese_news.summary:
当人形机器人在春晚上扭秧歌，在马拉松赛场上健步如飞，一个尴尬的现实浮出水面：机器人会动、很灵活，但不能干活——前者考验运动控制能力，后者还需要机器人真正理解物理环境，记住物体位置、推理空间关系。

感知瓶颈是今天几乎所有具身智能从业者都无法回避的现实。成立不到三个月的「映界科技」（MirrorSpace）正试图补齐具身智能产业链中的这个短板。映界科技由三位平均年龄仅有24岁的博士团队创办，专注具身机器人视觉空间感知系统的算法与硬件研发，致力于成为世界模型时代的基础设施服务商。

“我们注意到，目前市面上还没有相对成熟完善的空间感知解决方案，大部分做传感器的企业只是把雷达、摄像头等设备的原始数据丢给本体厂商，让他们自己想办法处理。”金依力表示，“我们希望提供一整套空间感知能力，弥合机器人在开放场景应用落地的gap。”

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报｜赢创计划全球裁员3200人；台积电28nm较年初减产25%；三星电子向韩国所有员工开放ChatGPT和Codex
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

赢创计划全球裁员3200人

赢创近日宣布，将延长“赢创定制”增效计划，涉及赢创全球所有业务及职能部门，拟裁减约3200个岗位，其中德国本土约占2150个。相关措施计划于2027年启动，持续至2029年底。6月22日，赢创确认，德国以外地区将削减1050个职位，中国区包含在内，但具体裁员数量尚未明确。“赢创定制”计划于2023年10月推出，原定目标为2026年底前累计削减约2800个岗位。今年5月，赢创曾表示该计划进展顺利并将实现既定降本目标。

chinese_news.title: 圆桌论坛：在没人相信之前，乘风破浪的创er | 36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
chinese_news.summary:
每一个创业者，都有一段“没人相信”的日子。但正是那段日子，把他们推向了浪尖。创业是鲜活的，接下来这一场，我们听一听那些在质疑声中长大的创业者，怎么把“不可能”变成“不，可能”。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑:

许嘉婧｜36氪后浪研究所 主理人（主持人）

徐子悦 ｜PhotonPay 光子易商务副总裁

程刚｜KOOK语音 创始人兼CEO

徐良威｜智域基石CTO

程二亭｜万拿机器人 创始人&CEO

薛昊昕｜

chinese_news.title: 圆桌讨论：在番禺，我们造了什么？｜36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
chinese_news.summary:
“2026年，创投圈的浪潮再次翻涌：AI从技术概念走进产业深水区，硬科技创业从“小众赛道” 变成“主流共识”，年轻的创业者们正在用代码和双手，重新定义中国创新的未来坐标。

每一年，由36氪 · 暗涌主办的WAVES大会，都是中国创投圈的年度风向标。今年的 WAVES 2026以“今年盛夏”为主题，落地广州番禺良仓新造创意园，在两天的时间里，我们汇聚了顶级投资人、产业领袖、新锐创业者，用14场深度圆桌、数十场独立演讲，拆解 AI、硬科技、出海、医疗等核心赛道的底层逻辑，见证那些“少数人” 的坚持，如何汇聚成改变行业的浪潮。”

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $70,000 by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Cointelegraph reports Bitcoin funding rates at 2-week highs with bullish orderbook setup, but macro headwinds (ETF outflows, geopolitical risk from Iran) create tension worth pricing.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Nvidia's stock outperform SPY by >10% through Q3 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CNBC reports Kalshi traders are betting chip prices decline and Nvidia stock is faltering; semiconductor capex cycles and AI researcher exodus at Alphabet create diverging narratives.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC + CoinDesk (AI talent flight from Ethereum Foundation, Alphabet exits)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Tesla face criminal charges related to Model 3 autonomy incidents by end-2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Federal probe into fatal Texas crash with partial autopilot involvement sets up regulatory escalation; safety litigation risk is material and underpriced in consensus.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Solana (SOL) hold above $60 through July 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Cointelegraph notes SOL captured 95% of tokenized equity volumes; traders debate if $60 is the bottom. Crypto sentiment cycle vulnerable to macro reversals (DXY, risk-off).
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (May 5, 2026) + Solana trending on crypto feeds

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX stock recover to IPO price ($50/share equivalent) by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CNBC reports 16% post-IPO decline (June 12 IPO date) cooling rally; IPO lockup expiry and Starship progress are near-term catalysts.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (May 5, 2026) SpaceX stock slump + IPO timeline

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum's price exceed $3,500 by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Coinbase, Kraken, or CoinMarketCap closing price
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Ethereum Foundation talent exodus and leadership concerns are priced as long-term risk; upcoming Shanghai/Pectra upgrades and RWA inflows on tokenization thesis (Franklin Templeton, Securitize) are underweighted.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk reports corporate Ether holders backing new research hub; Franklin Templeton digital assets grew to $2.5B; tokenization race heating up (Securitize/tZERO patent clash).

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. crude oil average >$80/barrel in Q3 2026 due to Iranian sanctions relief?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: EIA weekly crude oil prices, WTI spot
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Treasury authorized Iranian oil imports through August; transponders back online signals imminent volume surge. Geopolitical risk (nuclear talks, Vance's inspector comments) creates volatility but near-term supply shock underpriced.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC/CNBC: Bessent authorized Iranian imports; Vance indicates nuclear progress; supertankers exiting Persian Gulf with transponders active.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Micron (MU) or Super Micro (SMCI) report EPS beats >15% in Q2 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Company earnings reports (Micron expected this week per CNBC; Super Micro earnings date)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC flags heavy options activity and expects giant moves; AI capex cycle and TSMC production cuts (36Kr: 28nm down 25% YoY) create supply tightness benefiting memory/server vendors.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Micron and Cerebras earnings this week with expected volatility; 36Kr: TSMC 28nm capacity reduction signals memory/logic demand strength.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will a U.S. housing bill limiting private equity single-family purchases pass both chambers by August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Senate.gov or House.gov legislative tracking (final passage vote)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports Senate advancing housing bill; House expected to advance sprawling package this week. Bipartisan housing issue with real estate/inflation angle; underestimated as catalyst for housing stocks and mortgage REITs.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Senate advances housing bill; House expected to follow; private equity hedge fund lobbying spending not yet reflected in probability.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Solana (SOL) capture >50% of tokenized asset volumes through December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: DeFiLlama, Glassnode, or on-chain volume analytics (Solana vs. Ethereum+Polygon)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph: SOL already at 95% of tokenized equity volumes (snapshot); concentration risk and ecosystem developer momentum (Backpack trending) create narrative momentum but execution risk on scaling stability.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph (May 5): SOL dominance in tokenized equity; Backpack (SOL wallet) trending; OKX/ICE venture with Cuomo (crypto legitimacy narrative) boosts sentiment.

investment_theses.thesis: Long Bitcoin and Ethereum on macro risk-off and geopolitical hedging demand; position through BTC/ETH spot or perps as DXY rolls over and Iranian oil supply shock drives inflation anxiety.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Bitcoin funding rates at 2-week highs; bullish orderbook setup despite ETF outflows signals retail/institution conviction vs. smart money caution.
CNBC: Iranian oil imports authorized through August; supertankers resuming transponders = supply shock + risk premium.
BBC: Nuclear inspector talks progress (Vance) reduces immediate Iran military escalation but sustains oil premium; geopolitical uncertainty = hard-asset demand.
investment_theses.counter_view: ETF outflows indicate institutional hesitation; macro red flags (Cointelegraph mentions) could include Fed hawkishness, stronger USD, or risk-off equity selloff dragging crypto lower.
investment_theses.expression: BTC spot (long-term hold) + BTC 3-month perps (leverage 2-3x); alternatively, long BTC/short DXY via spot or synthetic pairing.

investment_theses.thesis: Short semiconductor cap-ex momentum via Nvidia underperformance relative to memory (MU, SMCI); Kalshi traders pricing chip price declines; TSMC 28nm capacity cuts offset by supply glut in leading-edge (H100/H200 cooling).
supporting_signals: CNBC: Kalshi traders betting chip prices decline; Nvidia stock faltering; analysts expect 'giant moves' on earnings.
36Kr: TSMC 28nm capacity down 25% from year start = supply tightness at mature nodes but excess at leading edge.
CoinDesk: AI researcher exodus from Alphabet, Ethereum Foundation signals talent/execution risk in next-gen chip roadmaps.
investment_theses.counter_view: Micron and Super Micro earnings could beat (CNBC flags options activity); memory cycle upside surprise; AI inference capex (not training) could sustain demand longer than expected.
investment_theses.expression: NVDA short (or NVDA put spreads) vs. long MU or SMH (semiconductor ETF) for relative hedge; or tactical short NVDA via put options expiring June–July 2026.

investment_theses.thesis: Accumulate Solana (SOL) as tokenization narrative compounds; 95% equity volume dominance, ecosystem velocity (Backpack, Pump.fun), and OKX/ICE partnership (Andrew Cuomo co-chair) de-risk institutional adoption; tactical dip-buying near $60 floor.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: SOL captured 95% of tokenized equity volumes; traders debating if $60 is multi-month bottom.
Cointelegraph: OKX/ICE tokenization venture with Cuomo signals TradFi-crypto mainstream bridge; approval likely by Q3.
Crypto trends: Solana, Backpack, Pump.fun all trending; developer momentum and user growth accelerating vs. Ethereum.
investment_theses.counter_view: Network stability or validator set risk; competition from Ethereum L2s (Arbitrum, Optimism) maturing; Solana's concentration risk (MEV, centralization concerns) resurfaces under scrutiny.
investment_theses.expression: Long SOL spot (hold through Q3) or SOL/BTC perpetual long (ratio upside); alternatively, overweight SOL-native tokens (PUMP, Backpack BP) if they receive listings.

investment_theses.thesis: Fade near-term Tesla rally on autopilot liability overhang and federal probe escalation; federal charges or recalls could trigger 10-20% drawdown by Q3 2026; hedge long-tech exposure via TSLA puts or tactical short.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Federal probe into fatal Model 3 crash with partial autopilot activation; 76-year-old death in Texas sets precedent for regulatory and criminal litigation.
CNBC: Safety litigation cycle typically 12-18 months from incident to settlement/charges; probe announcement is early inning of escalation.
Hacker News + broader sentiment: Automated vehicle safety is politicized; Democratic/Republican split on autonomous vehicle regulation could accelerate liability findings.
investment_theses.counter_view: Tesla stock resilience post-incident (Musk narrative strength, Starlink/SpaceX upside); Autopilot rebranding or settlement under $1B may already be priced in; EV competition weakness could offset liability headwind.
investment_theses.expression: Long-dated TSLA put spreads (6–9 month expiry, strikes $150–$170) or short TSLA June/July calls; or short TSLA spot with 3-5% trailing stop.

investment_theses.thesis: Long commodities (oil, gold) and short duration treasuries via steepener trade; Iranian oil supply shock, Canadian nuclear delay (Hacker News: 10 reactors over 15 years), and European heat stress (red alerts France/Italy/Spain 40C+) create stagflationary cross-currents through 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC/BBC: Iranian oil imports authorized; supertankers underway = 500K–1M bpd supply inbound, inflation impact by July.
Hacker News: Canada nuclear expansion multi-decade timeline; near-term energy supply constrained; summer 2026 heat waves strain grid and cooling demand.
BBC: Red heat alerts France/Italy/Spain; 40C+ forecasted; agricultural impact and energy demand (AC) boost inflation expectations.
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed tightens further if inflation accelerates; DXY strengthens, reducing commodity appeal; Saudi Arabia or OPEC+ responds with production cuts to defend price floors; global recession risk offsets energy demand.
investment_theses.expression: Long crude oil (CL futures or USO ETF) + long gold (GLD) + long inflation breakevens (TIP); or long 2Y10Y steepener (short 2Y, long 10Y Treasuries) as stagflation reprices curve.
